dates.summary: Google DeepMind released Gemma 4, a new open multimodal model family with up to 256K context and variants including 26B A4B and 31B, strengthening Google’s position in open-weight models for reasoning and agentic workflows. ByteDance Seed also launched Seed 2.0 and previewed Dola-Seed-2.0 on Arena, signaling continued competition in frontier model releases, while Anthropic changed Claude Code pricing so OpenClaw and other third-party harness usage no longer draws from standard Claude subscription limits.
